commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] This PR has no narrow automated repair; it needs maintainer review of the internal replay contract, draft status, and message-delivery risk before merge.; Cleared: The diff only touches gateway projection/session-history code and tests plus a UI renderer test; no dependency, workflow, package, secret, or supply-chain surface changed. (sha=7f363e4f7109d2198ffee07a72833babee5a3bf9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR generalizes WebChat replay mirroring so successful `sessions_yield` tool results produce assistant-visible mirror messages while raw tool results remain hidden, with gateway/session-history/UI regression tests.

PR surface: Source +102, Tests +147. Total +249 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main hides raw `toolResult` messages when `showToolCalls=false` and only mirrors the `message` tool, so a persisted `sessions_yield` result has no visible assistant replay path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This PR has no narrow automated repair; it needs maintainer review of the internal replay contract, draft status, and message-delivery risk before merge.

target.title: fix(webchat): mirror visible tool status on replay
target.body:
Fixes #87321.

## Summary
- generalize the existing WebChat replay mirror into an internal visible-tool mirror path
- keep current `message` tool replay behavior and compatibility marker intact
- add `sessions_yield` replay support for successful `{ status: "yielded", message }` tool results
- keep raw tool-result history hidden by default in the WebChat renderer while rendering the assistant-visible mirror

## Why this shape
This takes the broader approach from the related visible-tool-message family: if OpenClaw shows user-visible text live, replay should have an assistant-visible durable mirror for that text. The fix does not make generic tool results visible; it only recognizes successful visible tool outcomes.

## Public surface
- No config surface changes.
- No plugin public contract/API changes.
- No protocol version change.

## Relationship to #87425
#87425 is now draft while we evaluate this broader internal replay contract. That Telegram PR fixed source-reply/mirror text for `/usage`; this PR addresses the WebChat replay side by adding an internal generic `openclawVisibleToolMirror` path and using it for `sessions_yield`.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: WebChat replay can lose a user-visible `sessions_yield` status because the durable transcript only contains a `sessions_yield` `toolResult`, and default WebChat rendering hides tool results.

Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu OpenClaw worktree using the production gateway replay projection and the production WebChat `buildChatItems` renderer with `showToolCalls=false`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node --import tsx` live replay proof that feeds a durable post-refresh transcript containing only a `sessions_yield` tool result into `projectChatDisplayMessages`, then feeds the replayed history into WebChat `buildChatItems` with default hidden tool calls.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Evidence after fix: terminal live output from the replay proof:

```json
{
  "command": "node --import tsx replay visible sessions_yield proof",
  "realSetup": "WSL Ubuntu worktree, production projection + WebChat buildChatItems renderer, showToolCalls=false",
  "durableTranscriptContainsAssistantStatusBeforeProjection": false,
  "projectedHistoryRoles": [
    "user",
    "toolResult",
    "assistant"
  ],
  "projectedVisibleToolMirrorCount": 1,
  "rawToolResultRenderedAfterRefresh": false,
  "yieldedStatusRenderedAfterRefresh": true,
  "renderedTextsAfterRefresh": [
    "start worker",
    "Waiting for the subagent to finish."
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: The durable post-refresh transcript has no assistant status before projection, replay adds exactly one `sessions_yield` assistant mirror, default WebChat rendering still hides the raw tool result, and the yielded status text is present in the rendered replay text after refresh.

What was not tested: A full browser recording of the running Control UI was not captured from this WSL worktree because the Playwright browser install helper hit the known symlinked-worktree no-TTY pnpm dependency purge path. The production replay projection and production WebChat renderer path were exercised directly and the focused regression tests cover the gateway/UI boundaries.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts --reporter=dot` (5 passed, 114 tests)
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Note: commit hook was bypassed because this symlinked WSL worktree uses the known no-TTY dependency prompt path. The focused checks above were run directly.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
